text.title: Backup Strategies (3-2-1-1-0) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory
step.action: List all persistent stores + sensitivity classification.

step.name: set-rpo-rto
step.action: Negotiate RPO + RTO per store. Document in the spec.

step.name: choose-media
step.action: Pick 3+ copies on 2+ media types. At least 1 offsite + 1 immutable (COMPLIANCE).

step.name: schedule-and-retention
step.action: Configure backup schedule + lifecycle / forget rules.

step.name: automate-restore-verification
step.action: Wire a nightly (or weekly) job that restores latest + asserts integrity. Alert on failure.
